name: Platformer Solids (entity solids + swept collision proof)
description: Reuse proof for entity-vs-entity solid resolution + swept collision (the collision-resolution phase): a player lands on, is blocked by, bonks, and jumps off solid crate + ledge entities (each a role:"solid" collider), rides a vertical lift, and a fast faller lands on a thin platform without tunnelling. Built from move-platformer + velocity + a collider, with no host code.
